name: Carmel Nut Thumbprints
recipeInstructions:
Filling:
20 caramels (unwrapped)
1/4 cup half and half
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, butter, and shortening. Beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add vanilla and egg yolk; blend well.
4. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off. Add sifted flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder to the butter mixture. Mix well.
5. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Place pecans in another small bowl.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls. Dip each ball in egg white and then roll in pecans.
7. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Using the flat of your thumb, make an indentation in the center of each cookie.
9. Bake for 12 to 14 minutes or until set.
10. Remove cookies from sheets and place on wire racks.
11. Spoon 1/2 teaspoon warm caramel mixture into the center of each cooled cookie.
Makes approximately 48 cookies.
